response.justification: Excellent match with 14+ years of full-stack experience, direct expertise in TypeScript/Node.js/React, and current AI agent infrastructure work that aligns with modern engineering needs. Strong CS background, proven architectural contributions from multiple senior/staff roles, and demonstrated testing/TDD mindset. Minor gaps (Nest.js and specific testing libraries not explicitly mentioned) are negligible given the depth of core competencies and that role expects problem-solving, not framework-specific training.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript/Node.js full-stack expertise across multiple roles since 2012, exceeding 6+ year requirement by years
Current role at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, adding critical emerging skillset beyond typical requirements
Proven ability to design and maintain high-scale systems (Dunnhumby: millions of HTTP requests/second; GISCollective distributed Kubernetes platform)
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being primary backend framework—though strong Node.js/TypeScript fundamentals suggest quick proficiency
Jest/Vitest/Playwright testing frameworks not specifically called out; only general TDD and Selenium expertise visible, though testing mindset is evident
Recent staff-level roles and infrastructure focus (MCP code generators, AI tooling) may indicate preference for architectural work over full-stack feature delivery

key_factors.factor: AI agent infrastructure and agentic workflows experience
